com.tonic.jaloc.impl.lists

Class PLongList

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeCollection<A,W>
      • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeList<A,W>
        • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractPrimitiveList<PLongArray,PLongWriter>
          • com.tonic.jaloc.impl.lists.PLongList
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable

    public final class PLongList
extends AbstractPrimitiveList<PLongArray,PLongWriter>
    A growable native long list.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      PLongList()
      Creates an empty list with zero capacity on the system allocator.
      PLongList(long initialCapacity)
      Creates an empty list with the given starting capacity on the system allocator.
      PLongList(NativeAllocator allocator, long initialCapacity)
      Creates an empty list with the given starting capacity on the given allocator.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void add(long value)
      Appends value, growing if needed.
      void addAll(long... values)
      Appends values left to right in one capacity reservation.
      void addAll(long[] values, int offset, int length)
      Appends length values from the slice in one bulk copy.
      long binarySearch(long value)
      Binary searches the live range; content must be sorted.
      void forEach(java.util.function.LongConsumer consumer)
      Emits each element first to last.
      long get(long index)
      Reads the element at index.
      long removeLast()
      Removes and returns the last element.
      long set(long index, long value)
      Replaces the element at index.
      void sort()
      Sorts the live range ascending.

      • Methods inherited from class com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeList

        clear, ensureCapacity, trimToSize

      • Methods inherited from class com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeCollection

        capacity, close, isEmpty, isOpen, size

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • PLongList

        public PLongList()
        Creates an empty list with zero capacity on the system allocator.

      • PLongList

        public PLongList(long initialCapacity)
        Creates an empty list with the given starting capacity on the system allocator.
        Parameters:
        initialCapacity - the starting capacity
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if initialCapacity is negative

      • PLongList

        public PLongList(NativeAllocator allocator,
                 long initialCapacity)
        Creates an empty list with the given starting capacity on the given allocator.
        Parameters:
        allocator - the allocator to source memory from
        initialCapacity - the starting capacity
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if initialCapacity is negative

    • Method Detail

      • add

        public void add(long value)
        Appends value, growing if needed.
        Parameters:
        value - the value to append
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • addAll

        public void addAll(long... values)
        Appends values left to right in one capacity reservation.
        Parameters:
        values - the values to append
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if values is null
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • addAll

        public void addAll(long[] values,
                   int offset,
                   int length)
        Appends length values from the slice in one bulk copy.
        Parameters:
        values - the source array
        offset - the start within values
        length - the element count
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if values is null
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the slice is out of bounds
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • get

        public long get(long index)
        Reads the element at index.
        Parameters:
        index - the element index
        Returns:
        the element
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is out of range
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • set

        public long set(long index,
                long value)
        Replaces the element at index.
        Parameters:
        index - the element index
        value - the new value
        Returns:
        the previous value
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is out of range
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • removeLast

        public long removeLast()
        Removes and returns the last element.
        Returns:
        the removed element
        Throws:
        java.util.NoSuchElementException - if empty
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • forEach

        public void forEach(java.util.function.LongConsumer consumer)
        Emits each element first to last.
        Parameters:
        consumer - the receiver
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if consumer is null
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • sort

        public void sort()
        Sorts the live range ascending.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • binarySearch

        public long binarySearch(long value)
        Binary searches the live range; content must be sorted.
        Parameters:
        value - the value to find
        Returns:
        the matching index, or -(insertionPoint + 1) if absent
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed
